title: General Manager, DSSD
description:
This role is responsible for leading business development, marketing, and sales support activities for MELCO’s Defense and Space Systems business across the Asia-Pacific region. The General Manager will identify new business opportunities, strengthen regional partnerships, and ensure alignment with MELCO Defense Systems Division (DFD) strategy.

The position requires close coordination with Japan Headquarters and factories, as well as a strong understanding of regional defense environments and geopolitical considerations.

Key Responsibilities

Business Development & Strategy

  • Identify and pursue new business opportunities across the APAC region for all categories of MELCO defense and space systems products, in alignment with HQ strategy.
  • Analyze and interpret regional defense concepts and market dynamics to support opportunity development.
  • Conduct market analysis and continuous monitoring to support the formulation of marketing and sales strategies.

Stakeholder & Partner Management

  • Build, maintain, and strengthen relationships with sales representatives, industry partners, Japan Embassy personnel, and overseas group companies.
  • Navigate complex regional business environments to connect with potential customers, deepen collaboration with partners, and enhance awareness and understanding of MELCO’s defense business.

HQ & Factory Coordination

  • Coordinate and consult closely with MELCO Headquarters and factories in Japan on sensitive and strategic matters, ensuring appropriate governance and information flow.

Organizational Management

  • Lead organizational management activities, including annual business planning (BP/MYF), budget management, personnel development, and performance management.
  • Ensure compliance with applicable regulations, including export control, security, and corporate governance requirements.

Requirements

  • Degree in Engineering or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of 8 years’ experience in the defense manufacturing industry, with proven leadership responsibility.
  • Strong knowledge of defense and space products, the defense and space industry, and geopolitical matters relevant to national security.
  • Demonstrated strategic thinking, leadership, and decision-making capability in a multicultural environment.
  • High proficiency in Japanese (spoken and written), required for direct reporting and close collaboration with Japan Headquarters.

postedCompany.description:
Established in Singapore in 1977, Mitsubishi Electric Asia Pte Ltd is a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Electric Corporation, a world leading manufacturer of products ranging from home electronics to satellite systems. Mitsubishi Electric Asia Pte Ltd has been providing reliable, high-quality products to homes, businesses and industries in Asia Pacific region: these include home electronics, industrial and factory automation, visual and imaging products and power semiconductors.


MEQ, which stands for ‘Mitsubishi Electric Quality’, promises the best experience in our products, services, partnerships and people, and lies at the very core of our business.


At Mitsubishi Electric Asia Pte Ltd, we live by our pledged commitment to change for the better with every move we make.  We constantly strive to enhance all aspects of our business practices and operations so as to achieve the needs of our customers and stakeholders, as well as improving the wellbeing and quality of life of our employees, society and environment.


We would like to invite like-minded individuals to join our team. For more information on our company, please visit our website at http://www.MitsubishiElectric.com.sg/
postedCompany.name: MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC ASIA PTE LTD
